title: nf-core/references pipeline - params.asset schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.asset

genome.errorMessage: Genome name must be provided, cannot contain spaces

site.errorMessage: Website of origin of the reference, cannot contain spaces

source.errorMessage: Source of genome must be provided, cannot contain spaces

source_version.errorMessage: Source version used to create annotation files (gff/gtf related files), cannot contain spaces

species.errorMessage: Species of the reference, cannot contain spaces
